styles.name: Cinematic Film
styles.prompt_suffix: cinematic, 4K, photorealistic, Panavision Sphero 65 lens, film grain, dramatic lighting
styles.description: 默认风格，适合大多数题材

styles.name: Anime Classic
styles.prompt_suffix: anime style, Studio Ghibli inspired, hand-drawn look, vibrant colors, expressive eyes
styles.description: 二次元风格，适合奇幻/校园题材

styles.name: Cyberpunk Neon
styles.prompt_suffix: cyberpunk style, neon lights, high contrast, rain-soaked streets, futuristic, RED Monstro 8K
styles.description: 霓虹灯+暗色调，适合科幻/悬疑题材

styles.name: Chinese Ink Painting
styles.prompt_suffix: Chinese ink painting style, traditional brush strokes, misty mountains, elegant, ARRI ALEXA Mini LF
styles.description: 古风水墨，适合古装/武侠题材

styles.name: Korean Drama
styles.prompt_suffix: Korean drama style, warm soft focus, shallow depth of field, romantic lighting, Sony VENICE 2
styles.description: 暖色柔焦，适合甜宠/爱情题材

styles.name: Dark Thriller
styles.prompt_suffix: dark thriller style, chiaroscuro lighting, deep shadows, mysterious, ARRI ALEXA 65
styles.description: 明暗对比强，适合悬疑/复仇题材

styles.name: Vintage Hong Kong
styles.prompt_suffix: vintage Hong Kong cinema, Kodak Vision3 film, warm tones, grainy, Cooke Anamorphic lens
styles.description: 90年代港片质感，适合都市/江湖题材

styles.name: Wuxia Epic
styles.prompt_suffix: wuxia epic style, misty atmosphere, flowing fabrics, dynamic action, Panavision DXL2
styles.description: 雾气+大场面，适合武侠/玄幻题材

styles.name: Soft Romance
styles.prompt_suffix: soft romance style, dreamy bokeh, warm golden hour light, gentle, Canon C500
styles.description: 柔焦暖色，适合甜宠/恋爱题材

styles.name: Documentary Real
styles.prompt_suffix: documentary style, handheld camera, natural lighting, raw, Sony FX6
styles.description: 手持自然光，适合职场/现实题材

usage: 在生成AI提示词时，根据题材选择对应风格的prompt_suffix追加到每条提示词末尾
